zh.lifeSummary: 當Clemence de Mayenne於1160年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延麥延時，她的父親Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne26歲，母親Constance De Bretagne42歲。她於1175年與Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1190年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clemence de Mayenne于1160年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延麥延时，她的父亲Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne26岁，母亲Constance De Bretagne42岁。她于1175年与Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1190年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clemence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Clemence de Mayenne was born in 1160, in Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne, was 26 and her mother, Constance De Bretagne, was 42. She married Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master in 1175. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1190, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clemence de Mayenne est née en 1160, à Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Constance De Bretagne, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master en 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1190, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

Sie hat 1175 Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1190 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Mayenne è nata il nel 1160 nel Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Constance De Bretagne, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master nel 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1190, nel Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 30 anni.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Mayenne nasceu em 1160, em Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Constance De Bretagne, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master em 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1190, em Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clemence de Mayenne родилась в 1160 г. в местности меиенн, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance De Bretagne, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master в 1175 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1190 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 30 лет.

es.Mayenne, Maine Pays De La Loire, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clemence de Mayenne nació en 1160, en Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Constance De Bretagne, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master en 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1190, en Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 30 años.
